title: Midjourney V8 is NOW LIVE!! Here's how to use it.

segments.text: Midjourney version 8 is now live, but
not on the main MidJourney website.
[music]
But we can still go in and try out this
powerful new model and do some
comparisons to see if it's really a step
up from version 7. So essentially what
you need to do if you want to use this
model is head to alpha.mjourney.com
where you'll be met with a screen just
like this which details a lot of the
improvements. So we're going to test
those out and do a bit of a comparison
to see if V8 is really that much of a
step up. Now, I've been popping out some
images here, but if you actually go to
midjourney.com, you will not see the V8
images you've generated, but you're
probably going to notice a little bit of
a difference over here. We now have a
sidebar for our settings. So, I just
wanted to mention that quickly because
if you want to change your model, we
still have the model section here, and
we can change through here and find the
model we want to use, but we also have
this uh HD mode as well, so you can
switch between those two. We're going to
explore that later and what that does.
And you have your aesthetics like
stylize, weirdness, variety here, as
well as some other settings here for
your speed, stealth, video resolution,
that kind of thing. Now, you're probably
wondering where the mood boards are, cuz
we have a lot of the same options here.
But if we go to images, this is where we

cuz it appears that omni reference isn't

our mood boards, which this interface

here as well and the old personaliz. So,
that's something to be aware of. If you

Otherwise, you have your folders here,
conversation mode, the ability to search
in the grid view. We can actually change
and scroll between grids this way as
well. So, they have made some changes to

starting off with prompt understanding,
V8 is much better at taking detailed

to create something with a bit of

And raw mode hasn't really improved on
that particular instruction. So, at

that turned on. I'll pop that same
prompt in here to see if conversational

So, it seems that we're probably better
